nasb.text: the altar of burnt offering with its bronze grating, its poles, and all its utensils, the basin and its stand;

esv.text: the altar of burnt offering, with its grating of bronze, its poles, and all its utensils, the basin and its stand;

cnv.text: 燔祭壇、壇的銅網、壇槓、壇的一切器具、洗濯盆、盆座、

ccb.text: 燔祭坛、祭坛的铜网、抬祭坛的横杠、祭坛用的一切器具、洗濯盆和盆座；
